skill.name: threejs-scenes
skill.description: Build production-quality three.js WebGL scenes with vanilla three.js (no R3F). Use this skill whenever the user mentions three.js, WebGL, 3D scenes in the browser, isometric games, voxel worlds, infinite/endless scrollable 3D, procedural geometry, instancing/BatchedMesh, billboards, particle systems, shader effects, glitch effects, bloom, lens flares, god rays, depth of field, chromatic aberration, stereoscopy, anaglyph, film grain, HUD transitions, camera controls (orbit/follow/pan-zoom), touch-friendly 3D controls, three.js performance optimization, draw-call reduction, LOD, post-processing chains, EffectComposer, GLSL ShaderMaterial, or LLM-driven programmatic generation of three.js content. Also trigger when the user wants to build a 3D web experience, mounts a `canvas` for three.js, asks "how do I make this run smooth", needs frame-rate capping, or wants to generate 3D assets from text prompts via Gemini / ai-sdk function tools.

scripts.purpose: CLI for the live three.js docs — per-class markdown pages, llms-full.txt sections (TSL), search, manual articles. Not a scene module; run with `node`/`bun`.
Singleton render-loop adapter for `@tuomashatakka/canvas-loop-framecapper`. Drives every animated subsystem via `onFrame(cb)`.
`WebGLRenderer` factory with sane defaults + `ResizeObserver` attachment helper.
Minimal end-to-end scene wiring. Copy as starting point for any new scene.
Unified pointer handler — drag, pinch, wheel, tap. Mouse/touch/pen identical.
Seeded RNG (`mulberry32`) + hash/lerp/smoothstep helpers.
Recursive scene cleanup. Disposes geometries, materials, textures, render targets.
Device-tier detection + per-tier preset configs (shadows, post-fx, chunks, particles).
Isometric `OrthographicCamera` factory (true-iso or dimetric) + resize helper.
Critically-damped third-person follow with framerate-independent lerp.
Programmatic geometry — crystal-shard cluster. Template for any procedural BufferGeometry.
Extruded shapes (star/gear/panel) + a lathe vase via `createExtrudedMesh` / `createLatheMesh`.
Vertex deformers (`applyTwist`, `displaceByNoise`) + static-batch `mergeMeshes`.
`InstancedMesh` field — 1 draw call for N copies of one geometry.
`BatchedMesh` — 1 draw call for N varied geometries sharing one material.
Poisson disk 2D sampling for natural placement (forests, asteroids).
`VoxelChunk` class — flat `Uint16Array` storage with bounds-checked accessors.
Greedy voxel meshing. Reduces face count 10–30× vs naive 6-quads-per-cell.
Pooled chunk loader for infinite worlds. Origin rebasing avoids float32 precision rot.
Seamless tileable noise as `DataTexture` via toroidal simplex noise sampling.
Sprite atlas of text glyphs via `OffscreenCanvas`. Returns `CanvasTexture` + UV lookup.
PBR presets (`createStandardMaterial`) + toon + matcap factories.
Example `ShaderMaterial` with fresnel rim, scanlines, animated noise. Template for any custom shader.
`defineProp` (mesh + light + clips) + `createProp` + `createInstancedProp`.
Assemble props into one group with relative transforms via `createPropComposite`.
`createAnimationController` + programmatic clips; crossfade on the frame loop.
`loadGLTF` a model and play its baked `AnimationClip`s through the loop.
Reactive `render()` + `h()` + `signal()`; a signal drives a rotation accessor re-read each frame.
Standard scene lighting — IBL env + sun + hemisphere fill. Tuned shadow frustum.
CPU-driven instanced particle system. 10k–50k particles with custom physics.
GLSL-billboarded `InstancedMesh`. 1 draw call for 100k+ camera-facing quads.
`EffectComposer` factory with `DepthTexture` and bloom pre-wired.
Three glitch variants: RGB shift, block displacement, scan corruption. Stackable.
Screen-space radial blur from light position. Light auto-projected each frame.
Depth-of-field + chromatic aberration in one pass. Configurable focal point.
Procedural per-fragment grain with luma toggle and optional desaturation.
Horizontal beam phase-in with midpoint callback for content swap.
Anaglyph + side-by-side stereo render wrappers.
Six ai-sdk tool schemas (zod) for Gemini-driven scene generation.
CLI runner that calls a named tool, validates output, writes JSON + meta.

cases.title: minimal production scene
cases.summary: start with renderer, one loop, resize observer, pointer gestures, quality tiers, and explicit cleanup.

cases.title: camera and touch controls
cases.summary: orbit, iso, follow, path, pointer capture, pinch zoom, and raycast-safe pointer coordinates.

cases.title: instancing, billboards, and infinite scenes
cases.summary: choose InstancedMesh, BatchedMesh, billboards, chunk managers, and origin rebasing for large worlds.

cases.title: geometry and procedural generation
cases.summary: build shapes, extrusions, tubes, lattices, seeded scatter, noise textures, and runtime geometry factories.

cases.title: materials and shaders
cases.summary: combine pbr presets, toon ramps, matcaps, triplanar mapping, and shader-material recipes without raw string chaos.

cases.title: lighting setup
cases.summary: compose image-based environment, shadow-tuned sun, hemisphere fill, and visible light cones.

cases.title: particles and billboards
cases.summary: use cpu instanced particles, gpu-emitter paths, baked curves, and camera-facing sprite batches.

cases.title: post-processing effects
cases.summary: wire composer chains, bloom, glitch, god rays, dof, film grain, hud beam transitions, and stereoscopy.
checklist: disable expensive passes on touch devices

cases.title: voxel worlds
cases.summary: store voxel chunks compactly, greedy-mesh exposed faces, and update only affected chunks.

cases.title: props, animation, and jsx
cases.summary: compose props, load gltf fallbacks, author programmatic clips, and mount reactive jsx scenes without react.

cases.title: performance and debug workflow
cases.summary: diagnose draw calls, fragments, gc pressure, shader stalls, and scene ownership before optimizing.

cases.title: llm-driven scene generation
cases.summary: route prompts through structured function tools, zod validation, deterministic seeds, and auditable generated files.
